Specification: VAC Motorsports M50/M52/S50/S52 Oil Pump Upgrade Kit

Notes: Verified - Critical for vibration control above 7500 RPM

Verified $610. Full kit: 27x11.75x3 bar-and-plate intercooler core + aluminum piping + silicon hoses + T-clamps + BOV + mounting brackets. Designed for E36 top-mount T3 turbo (M5x application). Specification: Siemens Deka 630cc EV1 - Set of 6 (replaces Phase 1 440cc)
Notes: Verified $325. Replaces Phase 1 Bosch 440cc set — 440cc insufficient for 450-600hp on E85. Siemens Deka 630cc EV1: same plug connector as OEM BMW M50/M52 injector body — fits stock fuel rail. High-impedance (12.5 Ohm), MaxxECU does not require driver modification. Phase 1 440cc injectors can be resold (~$150-200) or kept as spare. Price here is the new set only — do not add to Phase 1 injector cost.

Required for boost control with MaxxECU. MaxxECU drives boost solenoid via a GPO (general purpose output) using PWM duty cycle. Budget alt: Bosch N75 2-port solenoid ~$40 (PN 0280142431, 3-bar range). Both work — Turbosmart is the cleaner option with labeled AN fittings. Same solenoid carries to 07K phase.
